title: NINA SEAPOP Source — OBIS Occurrence Record
abstract: Source-faithful schema for a single occurrence record from the OBIS v3 API for the NINA SEAPOP seabird monitoring dataset.
description:
## Source dataset

The NINA SEAPOP dataset (OBIS ID `561441ab-128b-4be7-8fce-de1ef79855da`) contains 279,170 seabird colony occurrence records from Norway and Svalbard, maintained by the Norwegian Institute for Nature Research (NINA) under the SEAPOP long-term monitoring programme.

## API structure

The OBIS v3 occurrence API returns a JSON envelope:

```json
{ "total": 279170, "results": [ <record>, ... ] }
```

Each record is a flat object — **not** a GeoJSON Feature. Transformation to GeoJSON is required for OGC API Features endpoints (see `nina-seapop-oim`).

## Field provenance

Fields in each record fall into three categories:

### Darwin Core source fields (from original NINA data collector)
`occurrenceID`, `basisOfRecord`, `catalogNumber`, `collectionCode`, `institutionCode`, `datasetID`, `occurrenceStatus`, `scientificName`, `scientificNameID`, `kingdom`, `phylum`, `class`, `order`, `family`, `genus`, `species`, `decimalLatitude`, `decimalLongitude`, `coordinateUncertaintyInMeters`, `country`, `stateProvince`, `locality`, `modified`

### WoRMS taxonomy IDs (resolved by OBIS from scientificNameID)
`kingdomid`, `phylumid`, `classid`, `orderid`, `familyid`, `genusid`, `speciesid`, `subphylum`, `subphylumid`, `infraphylum`, `infraphylumid`, `megaclass`, `megaclassid`, `superclass`, `superclassid`, `aphiaID`

### OBIS enrichment (NOT from original data collector)
| Field | Source model | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `bathymetry` | EMODnet/GEBCO | depth at point |
| `shoredistance` | GSHHS | negative = inland |
| `sst` | WOA climatology | surface temperature mean |
| `sss` | WOA climatology | surface salinity mean |

### OBIS internal flags
`id` (OBIS UUID), `dataset_id`, `node_id`, `dropped`, `absence`, `flags`, `category`, `unaccepted`, `marine`, `brackish`

## Known quality flags

- `NO_DEPTH` — no depth recorded; expected for all seabird colony records (birds, not marine organisms)
- `ON_LAND` — observation point plots on land per GSHHS; expected for terrestrial/cliff-nesting colonies within the GSHHS coastline polygon

## Critical missing fields in OBIS view

The following Darwin Core fields are present in the GBIF distribution (`4c7a13a5-72b1-41ff-ad7c-8af40d3cc3cc`) but **stripped by the OBIS ingestion pipeline**:
- `eventDate` — observation date
- `individualCount` / `organismQuantity` — count of individuals
- `samplingProtocol` — survey method
- `taxonRank`

For any use case requiring dates or counts, query the GBIF API directly.
usageGuidance: Use this BB as the source-side contract in a BB1→BB2 transformation pipeline.
For temporal or count analysis, use the GBIF distribution (datasetKey 4c7a13a5-72b1-41ff-ad7c-8af40d3cc3cc) instead of OBIS — it preserves eventDate and individualCount.
Do not confuse OBIS enrichment fields (bathymetry, sst, sss, shoredistance) with source measurements.
ON_LAND and NO_DEPTH flags are expected for seabird colony records and should not be treated as quality failures.
